name: SOT3 Truth Kernel Runtime Owner

citations.evidenceRole: TruthKernel class and evaluate method runtime symbol evidence

claimBoundary: ACCEPTED_REVIEW_EVIDENCE only. TruthKernel and its evaluate method exist as bounded local-ready package runtime and are the sole producer of KernelDecision, TruthReceipt, and TruthReference for an evaluated request. This entry does not claim the Kernel is globally activated, always invoked by any CVF Web or production request path, a provider boundary, publicly exported, or production-ready. Activation into a real product path is governed separately by the SOT3 activation architecture decision and its A1-A5 proof ladder, not by this catalog record.
boundaryCaveat: Does not claim universal activation, provider/live behavior, public export, or production readiness. Local-ready package existence only; wiring into any product request path remains governed by the separate SOT3 activation decision and roadmap.
